name: Aunt Tommy's Sausage Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the crusts from the bread.
2. Butter each slice of bread.
3. Grease a 7 x 11 inch pan.
4. Place 6 slices of buttered bread, with the butter side down, in the pan.
5. Cook the sausage and onion, breaking up the sausage as it cooks. Drain any excess fat.
6. Stir in the pimientos.
7. Spread the meat mixture evenly over the bread slices.
8. Top with half of the grated cheese.
9. Place the remaining 6 slices of buttered bread on top of the cheese layer.
10. In a large bowl, beat together the eggs, milk, and salt.
11. Pour the egg mixture over the bread.
12. Top with the remaining half of the cheese.
13. Cover and refrigerate for up to 18 hours.
14. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
15. Bake in the preheated oven for 50 minutes.
16. Serve immediately.
